acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_award_001] In the revised reveal starting at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:255 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:337, Owen should leave with one concrete fact about amendment magic and one concrete planetary implication, but at least one major conclusion must remain explicitly provisional or unresolved in the text. If the passage still states both the First Art substrate and the whole-world hiding claim as settled conclusions in polished explanatory prose, it fails.

[chapter_02_craft_001] Across the revised reading passage beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:255, no more than two consecutive paragraphs may remain purely interpretive. Within every two paragraphs, the text must reassert at least one active physical or tactical consequence from the crawlspace itself. If the reveal can still be read as uninterrupted abstract explanation with the chamber's danger effectively absent until snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:291, it fails.

[chapter_02_prose_001] In the revised cited passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:251, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:339, the exact negation-definition pattern should appear no more than twice total. If three or more near-identical 'It/They was/were not ... It was ...' pivots remain across those lines, it fails.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised reveal starting at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:255 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:337, Owen should leave with one concrete fact about amendment magic and one concrete planetary implication, but at least one major conclusion must remain explicitly provisional or unresolved in the text. If the passage still states both the First Art substrate and the whole-world hiding claim as settled conclusions in polished explanatory prose, it fails.
findings.problem: The manuscript discovery resolves into essay-clean conclusions too quickly. Owen arrives at the First Art's rule-editing substrate and planetary concealment in polished declarative abstractions, so the chapter delivers the ideas efficiently but not with the lingering uncanniness or remainder of mystery that shortlist-level discovery scenes usually preserve.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the reveal paragraphs beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:255 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:337 so Owen's understanding stays more provisional on first contact. Keep the required beats, but let at least one major inference remain contested, misread, or only half-named on the page instead of fully cashing out the manuscript into a settled thesis about rule-editing magic and whole-world concealment.

findings.acceptance_test: Across the revised reading passage beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:255, no more than two consecutive paragraphs may remain purely interpretive. Within every two paragraphs, the text must reassert at least one active physical or tactical consequence from the crawlspace itself. If the reveal can still be read as uninterrupted abstract explanation with the chamber's danger effectively absent until snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:291, it fails.
findings.problem: After the coffer burns Owen, the scene drops too much of its bodily and curfew pressure for a long explanatory run. The crawlspace, the pain, and the risk of being caught recede while the manuscript is interpreted, so the chapter briefly reads like a note-taking session inside a chamber that should still feel cramped, illegal, and unstable.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the reading sequence beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:255 so the interpretation is repeatedly interrupted by local consequence from the same scene: Owen's burned palm, the cramped posture, the ash-thick air, leaking wandlight, or library noise overhead. Use snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:291 as the model for how quickly physical reality can reassert itself, and push some of that pressure earlier into the reveal paragraphs.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised cited passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:251, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:339, the exact negation-definition pattern should appear no more than twice total. If three or more near-identical 'It/They was/were not ... It was ...' pivots remain across those lines, it fails.
findings.problem: The chapter leans repeatedly on the same negation-to-definition sentence shape: 'It was not X. It was Y.' and close variants. Used this often, the pattern stops feeling like deliberate emphasis and starts reading as a recognizable prose tic that flattens separate beats into the same rhetorical move.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:251, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:339, keep only the strongest one or two negation pivots. Recast the others through image, action, or sentence shapes that do not repeat the same 'not this, but that' formula.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
